name: Chirag Dhunna
headline: Full-Stack Software Engineer | Python Backend & GenAI
work_authorization: Indian citizen — seeking UK Skilled Worker visa sponsorship
summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 1+ years of experience building scalable applications across cloud and mobile platforms. Skilled in AWS, Azure, CI/CD pipelines, system design, large language model integration, and RESTful API development.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
highlights: Architected enterprise conversational AI solutions on AWS and Azure, enabling chatbot deployments that scaled to 10,000+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime.
Engineered full-stack chatbot interfaces in React with real-time dynamic flows, increasing end-user engagement by 30% across 3 production client accounts.
Developed backend microservices using Java and Spring Boot for conversation orchestration and OAuth2 authentication, cutting API response latency by 25%.
Implemented AI/LLM-powered workflows into 3 enterprise systems via prompt engineering and API chaining, decreasing manual operational workload by 40%.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer
highlights: Automated iOS and Android build distribution using Fastlane scripts, shortening release cycle duration by 50% and eliminating manual handoffs for a 10-person QA team.
Localized application content for 5 languages using Flutter internationalization framework, expanding the product's reach into 3 new international markets.
Strengthened audio and video call reliability via LiveKit SDK, decreasing connection failure rates by 35% and improving average call quality scores by one tier.
Delivered a live streaming pipeline with under 500ms end-to-end latency using LiveKit, supporting 1,000+ concurrent viewers without degradation under peak load.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
highlights: Redesigned mobile interfaces for SuperAstro and Kosmic apps through 4 rounds of user research and A/B-tested prototypes, achieving a 25% gain in usability scores.
Established REST API and message broker connections to the app data layer, raising system throughput capacity to handle a 2x spike in peak-hour traffic.
Deployed Firebase Cloud Messaging push notifications, resulting in a 20% rise in daily active users within 30 days of launch.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
